Steps: 1. Buka http://127.0.0.1:8001/ 2. Masukkan admin / admin123 3. Klik Sign In
Expected Result: Redirect ke dashboard, lihat 4 stat boxes (Projects, Findings, Late Findings, SLA Compliance %)

Steps: 1. Buka http://127.0.0.1:8001/ 2. Masukkan admin / wrongpassword 3. Klik Sign In
Expected Result: Error: 'Your username and password didn't match.'

Steps: 1. Klik Logout di navbar kanan atas
Expected Result: Redirect ke login page

Steps: 1. Login sebagai admin 2. Lihat chart Findings by Severity
Expected Result: Chart doughnut muncul dengan warna: Critical=hitam, High=merah, Medium=kuning, Low=biru

Steps: 1. Login sebagai admin 2. Lihat chart Project Schedule (SPI)
Expected Result: Chart doughnut muncul: On Track (hijau) vs Delayed (merah)

Steps: 1. Login sebagai admin 2. Lihat tabel Recent Findings
Expected Result: Tabel muncul dengan title, severity badge berwarna, dan project name

Steps: 1. Login sebagai admin 2. Lihat tabel Recent Projects
Expected Result: Tabel muncul dengan project name, status, dan SPI badge

Steps: 1. Login sebagai admin 2. Lihat sidebar
Expected Result: Menu: Dashboard, Organizations, Projects, Findings, VKB, Reports. ADMINISTRATION: User Management, Role Management, SLA Profiles, Report Template, Audit Log

Steps: 1. Buat user non-admin 2. Login user tersebut 3. Lihat sidebar
Expected Result: Hanya menu utama (Dashboard, Organizations, Projects, Findings, VKB, Reports). Tidak ada ADMINISTRATION section.

Steps: 1. Klik Organizations di sidebar 2. Klik Add New Organization 3. Isi name + description 4. Save
Expected Result: Organization baru muncul di list

Steps: 1. Di organization list, klik Edit 2. Ubah description 3. Save
Expected Result: Description berubah di detail page

Steps: 1. Di organization list, klik Delete 2. Konfirmasi delete
Expected Result: Organization hilang dari list

Steps: 1. Buat SLA Profile dulu (/projects/sla/) 2. Klik Projects → Create New Project 3. Isi form + pilih SLA Profile 4. Save
Expected Result: Project muncul di list dengan SLA profile yang terpilih

Steps: 1. Klik Edit di project list 2. Ubah status ke Completed 3. Save
Expected Result: Project detail: completed_date terisi otomatis, SPI dihitung

Steps: 1. Buka detail project 2. Scroll semua section
Expected Result: Tampil: Project info, SLA profile, SPI, Assignments, Stakeholders, Scanning Reports, Findings, Report History, Activity

Steps: 1. Di project detail, klik Assign User 2. Pilih user + title 3. Assign
Expected Result: User muncul di list Assignments

Steps: 1. Di project detail, klik Remove pada assignment 2. Konfirmasi
Expected Result: Assignment hilang dari list

Steps: 1. Di project detail, klik Add Stakeholder 2. Isi name, email, position 3. Add
Expected Result: Stakeholder muncul di list

Steps: 1. Di project detail, klik Add Finding 2. Isi form — PoC gunakan Quill editor (bold, italic, paste image) 3. Save
Expected Result: Finding muncul di list. PoC render HTML dengan format

Steps: 1. Klik Edit di finding list 2. Ubah severity dari Medium ke High 3. Save
Expected Result: Finding detail: severity berubah, activity log mencatat perubahan

Steps: 1. Ke /findings/ 2. Ketik keyword di search box 3. Klik Filter
Expected Result: Hanya findings yang title/description mengandung keyword yang tampil

Steps: 1. Ke /findings/ 2. Pilih Critical di dropdown severity 3. Filter
Expected Result: Hanya Critical findings yang tampil

Steps: 1. Ke /findings/ 2. Pilih project di dropdown 3. Filter
Expected Result: Hanya findings dari project tersebut yang tampil

Steps: 1. Ke /findings/ 2. Set date_from dan date_to 3. Filter
Expected Result: Hanya findings dalam range tanggal tersebut yang tampil

Steps: 1. Ke /findings/ 2. Set severity=High, status=Open, keyword=XSS 3. Filter
Expected Result: Hasil filter kombinasi yang benar

Steps: 1. Set beberapa filter 2. Klik Clear
Expected Result: Kembali ke tampilan tanpa filter (semua findings)

Steps: 1. Buat 15+ findings 2. Set filter severity=High 3. Klik Next page
Expected Result: Pagination link preserve filter param severity=High

Steps: 1. Ke /projects/sla/ 2. Klik Add SLA Profile 3. Isi name + days per severity 4. Save
Expected Result: Profile muncul di list dengan nilai days

Steps: 1. Buat SLA Profile A (is_default=True) 2. Buat SLA Profile B (is_default=True) 3. Refresh list
Expected Result: Profile A is_default=False, Profile B is_default=True

Steps: 1. Delete SLA Profile yang digunakan project 2. Lihat project detail
Expected Result: Project detail: SLA Profile → 'Default SLA' (fallback)

Steps: 1. Buat SLA Critical=3 hari 2. Assign ke project 3. Buat finding Critical di project tsb
Expected Result: SLA due date = created_at + 3 hari (bukan default 7 hari)

Steps: 1. Buat finding Critical, set created_at 8 hari lalu 2. Lihat project detail
Expected Result: Finding ditandai merah (table-danger), late=True, delay=1 hari

Steps: 1. Ke /vkb/ 2. Klik Create 3. Isi form vulnerability template 4. Save
Expected Result: VKB entry muncul di list

Steps: 1. Buat VKB entry (SQL Injection) 2. Create finding, pilih VKB di dropdown 3. Save
Expected Result: Fields terisi otomatis dari VKB

Steps: 1. Create finding dengan save_to_vkb=True 2. Pilih category 3. Save
Expected Result: VKB entry baru terbuat dengan data finding

Steps: 1. Di project detail (yang memiliki findings) 2. Klik Generate Report 3. Tunggu beberapa detik
Expected Result: Report muncul di Report History dengan status Done

Steps: 1. Klik Preview pada report Done 2. Lihat tab baru
Expected Result: Report MD dirender sebagai HTML: headings, tables, bold, code blocks

Steps: 1. Klik Download pada report Done
Expected Result: File .md terdownload

Steps: 1. Klik Delete pada report 2. Konfirmasi
Expected Result: Report hilang dari history

Steps: 1. Ke /reports/ 2. Lihat tabel
Expected Result: Tabel dengan kolom: Project, Organization, File, Format, Status, Created, Actions. Filter dropdowns: Project, Format, Status

Steps: 1. Ke /reports/ 2. Pilih project di dropdown 3. Filter
Expected Result: Hanya report dari project tsb

Steps: 1. Ke /reports/template/ 2. Edit konten template 3. Save 4. Generate report baru
Expected Result: Report menggunakan template yang sudah diedit

Steps: 1. Create finding baru 2. Buka /audit/
Expected Result: Audit log: Created by admin + timestamp

Steps: 1. Edit finding (ubah severity) 2. Buka /audit/
Expected Result: Audit log: Updated by admin, changes: severity→...

Steps: 1. Edit finding 2x (ubah severity, ubah status) 2. Lihat Activity di finding detail
Expected Result: 3 entry: create + 2 update dengan detail perubahan

Steps: 1. Edit project status 2. Lihat Activity di project detail
Expected Result: 2 entry: create + update dengan detail perubahan

Steps: 1. Login 2. Lihat keseluruhan layout
Expected Result: Dark sidebar, Bootstrap 5.3, Bootstrap Icons, no jQuery, smooth animations

Steps: 1. Login 2. Cek semua halaman
Expected Result: Semua icon Bootstrap Icons (bi bi-*), tidak ada Font Awesome (fa fa-*)

Steps: 1. Buat findings: Critical, High, Medium, Low 2. Lihat di finding list, dashboard, project detail
Expected Result: Critical=hitam, High=merah, Medium=kuning, Low=biru, Info=hijau

Expected Result: Tema berubah ke dark mode (jika tersedia di AdminLTE v4)
